prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical anime fantasy illustration of a young female ninja warrior leaping through the air in a dynamic crouched attack pose during cherry blossom season. She has long flowing black hair with magenta highlights, intense violet eyes, and a focused expression, with cherry blossoms woven into her hair. She wears an ornate dark purple and black shinobi outfit with gold accents, layered kimono sleeves, floral sakura patterns, thigh straps, belts, chains, armored sandals, fingerless gloves, and translucent pink fabric panels streaming behind her. She grips two crossed kunai-like short blades above her head, decorated with small circular emblems, while her hair and ribbons whip dramatically in the wind. The setting is an ancient Japanese temple complex at sunset: a tall illuminated pagoda on the right, stone stairs below, two visible guardian lion-dog statues flanking the approach, distant mountains and a glowing horizon in the background. Frame the scene with dense pink cherry blossom branches at the top and sides, with countless petals flying across the image. Behind the warrior, create a huge luminous circular vortex of golden-pink magical energy, sparks, and brushlike light trails; add exactly two phoenix-shaped fire spirits in the upper sky. Use a rich violet, magenta, rose-gold, and deep navy palette, cinematic lighting, ultra-intricate linework, glossy highlights, dramatic perspective from slightly below, high motion, fantasy concept-art detail, 2D anime illustration style, sharp focus on the character, no text, no watermark. Aspect ratio: vertical 3:4.
